notes: Solid Tetris implementation with DAS, hold, ghost piece, line clears, scoring, and level progression all working correctly; minor issues include non-standard piece spawn positions and simplified wall kicks that may miss some SRS edge cases.
Excellent presentation and controls (including DAS and lock delay), but a severe array manipulation bug during multi-line clears leaves full rows on the board, ruining gameplay.

A solid and mostly complete Tetris build with hold, ghost piece, bag randomizer, scoring, pause, and game over, but simplified kicks, some nonstandard behavior, and likely control-preventDefault side effects keep it well short of perfect.
